violations.description: Large workflow/script files are repeatedly read in multiple tests, adding avoidable per-test IO overhead.
violations.suggestion: Cache parsed workflow/script content in beforeAll or fixture setup and share immutable snapshots.

violations.description: Multiple policy harness invocations are executed serially inside single tests, increasing runtime under constrained CI workers.
violations.suggestion: Use table-driven or batched harness execution where deterministic and safe, or split into smaller focused tests.

performance_metrics.avg_test_duration_estimate: ~1-4s per test depending on temp-repo harness operations

recommendations: Cache immutable workflow/script fixtures per file/suite.
Keep tests parallel-friendly; avoid unnecessary serial orchestration in single test bodies.
Profile harness-heavy tests in CI and split long scenarios if they drift upward in duration.
summary: Performance is generally strong and parallel-safe; moderate gains remain via fixture caching and reduced serial harness work.
